understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle where you must activate and step on one or more goal cells in each level. To activate a goal cell, your carried piece must simultaneously match the goal's required shape, color, and rotation. Once all goals in a level are completed, you advance to the next level until all levels are finished.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is played on a grid with walls, floors, modifier tiles, and goal cells. Each move costs 1 stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina; losing all lives ends the game. Modifier tiles alter your piece: shape changer cycles through shapes 0-5, color changer cycles orange→blue→green→red→orange, rotation changer rotates 90° clockwise (0°→90°→180°→270°→0°). A goal cell is activated only when all three attributes match its requirements. You must step on the activated goal to complete it. You cannot move through walls, and the game provides blocked_directions each turn to avoid invalid moves. Planning routes efficiently is crucial because wasted moves deplete stamina.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle where you must activate and step on one or more goal cells in each level. To activate a goal cell, your carried piece must simultaneously match the goal's required shape, color, and rotation. Once all goals in a level are completed, you advance to the next level until all levels are finished.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is played on a grid with walls, floors, modifier tiles, and goal cells. Each move costs 1 stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina; losing all lives ends the game. Modifier tiles alter your piece: shape changer cycles through shapes 0-5, color changer cycles orange→blue→green→red→orange, rotation changer rotates 90° clockwise (0°→90°→180°→270°→0°). A goal cell is activated only when all three attributes match its requirements. You must step on the activated goal to complete it. You cannot move through walls, and the game provides blocked_directions each turn to avoid invalid moves. Planning routes efficiently is crucial because wasted moves deplete stamina.
